sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἰωσή

- Transliteration: Iose

- Phonetic: ee-o-say'

- Definition: Jose = "he will be sustained of Jehovah"

1. the son of Eliezer, in the genealogy of Jesus Christ

- Origin: genitive case of G2500

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Genitive case of G2500; Jose an Israelite: - Jose.
